Publications of Ron Johnston

A searchable list of his published works, 1965–2020

← Back to Geography and a Geographer

Ron Johnston published prolifically across six decades.Using AI, some publications are matched against various research themes using their abstract where possible (via OpenAlex and, where available, the publisher’s webpage) or title, plus the journal name or year if informative. The three themes marked * are those that Ron used to describe his research interests. Keywords are recurring words drawn from the titles and abstracts only.

Last updated: 15 July 2026 This page lists 1,621 of his works. 879 are drawn from his own, chronologically numbered publication archive (the numbering system is his). A further 742 - chiefly books, book chapters and reviews - are drawn from a 2013 CV. We have ‘numbered’ those A, B, C… onward. The list remains incomplete and will continue to be checked, cleaned and updated.

Use the search boxes to find and filter publications. Where a DOI or other persistent link is available it is included. Please let us know about any missing references and, if you spot any errors, please select and report them so we can update the records.
